source_jobs.title: Senior Technical Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
Talentful is shaping the future of how high-growth companies build world-class teams. We partner with some of the fastest-scaling technology businesses to turn talent into a durable competitive advantage and help them win in the market by attracting, engaging, and retaining the top talent who accelerate growth.

Founded in 2015, Talentful brings together seasoned talent leaders who embed seamlessly alongside in-house teams. Through a flexible, subscription-based model, we provide the strategic horsepower and operational execution needed to scale with precision—from executive hiring and workforce planning to improving talent processes, employer brand activation, and building inclusive, high-performing organizations.

Our focus is not simply filling roles, but enabling talent functions to deliver measurable business outcomes. We’ve helped global innovators scale efficiently and thoughtfully, including Alphabet, Microsoft, Pinterest, Atlassian, Expedia, Instacart, Miro, and many more.

With a global team across Europe and the US, we’re united by a single mission: to help every company we work with grow to its highest potential. As we continue building the world’s leading talent consultancy, we’re looking for people who want to help redefine what “recruitment” can be by transforming it into a true driver of business value and long-term competitive advantage.

What will you do around here?

 - Find and attract the world's best talent to our clients

 - Utilize a range of deep sourcing techniques to find passive candidates, including Linkedin and other outside-the-box sourcing strategies

 - Working with one client at a time to get deeply embedded in their culture both socially and professionally

 - Partner with top-tier stakeholders, helping them to understand the value of good talent practice

 - Your focus will be recruiting great people across technical disciplines

We'd love to chat with you if you have:

 - 4-8 years of technical recruitment experience, in a fast-paced environment, including experience filling niche roles

 - Ideally 1+ year of in-house recruitment experience

 - Strong sourcing skills, experience with Boolean

 - Excellent written and verbal communication

 - Exceptional organizational skills and detail-orientated

 - You communicate professionally with candidates and internal stakeholders

What's in it for you?

 - This is the best place in the world for talent professionals to develop and hone their skills.

 - Working alongside world-class people, in an environment where sharing of knowledge and best practice is a constant.

The cash compensation range we have provided has been benchmarked against similar organizations of comparable size, sector and age. Our offers of employment consider a variety of factors, including but not limited to, unique skill sets, specific expertise or certifications and business/organizational needs. It is not typical for us to hire talent at the top of the range for a role, in part because it’s so important to us to allow all Talentful employees the opportunity to develop over time, and to feel rewarded for doing so. A reasonable estimate of the total yearly compensation range for an IC at Talentful $82,000- $135,700 USD.

Our Global Benefits

 - Learning & development
   Accelerating your personal and professional growth.

 - Flexible working
   Hybrid or Remote work to suit your lifestyle - we trust our people.

 - Healthcare options
   From employer contributions to health insurance.

 - Wellness allowance contributions
   Improve either your physical, financial, or mental health with our monthly stipend.

 - Global co-working
   Deskpass memberships for everyone in our team to work globally on-demand.

 - Enhanced parental leave
   14 weeks paid maternity & 3 weeks paid paternity after 1 year service.

 - Retirement plan
   Matched pension contributions or 401(k) plan to start saving.

source_jobs.title: Director of People & Agent Operations
source_jobs.description:
Talentful is shaping the future of how high-growth companies build world-class teams. We partner with some of the fastest-scaling technology businesses to turn talent into a durable competitive advantage and help them win in the market by attracting, engaging, and retaining the top talent who accelerate growth.

Founded in 2015, Talentful brings together seasoned talent leaders who embed seamlessly alongside in-house teams. Through a flexible, subscription-based model, we provide the strategic horsepower and operational execution needed to scale with precision—from executive hiring and workforce planning to improving talent processes, employer brand activation, and building inclusive, high-performing organizations.

Our focus is not simply filling roles, but enabling talent functions to deliver measurable business outcomes. We’ve helped global innovators scale efficiently and thoughtfully, including Alphabet, Microsoft, Pinterest, Atlassian, Expedia, Instacart, Miro, and many more.

With a global team across Europe and the US, we’re united by a single mission: to help every company we work with grow to its highest potential. As we continue building the world’s leading talent consultancy, we’re looking for people who want to help redefine what “recruitment” can be by transforming it into a true driver of business value and long-term competitive advantage.


WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS

Talentful is a 350-person talent company that embeds recruiters inside the world's best tech companies. We've built the model. Now we're rebuilding how we operate it.

We're creating a company where AI agents and humans work side by side — not as a novelty, but as the default. Where retention strategy is informed by data, not gut feel. Where L&D is continuous and personalised, not annual and generic. Where compensation is a system, not a spreadsheet.

This role exists because we believe the People function should be the most operationally sophisticated part of any company — and almost nowhere is.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN


PEOPLE OPERATIONS

 - Culture strategy — building and sustaining a high-performance environment across two geographies

 - Compensation architecture — pay bands, equity, benchmarking, total rewards philosophy

 - Retention & internal mobility — making Talentful the place people stay and grow, not just start

 - Learning & development — skills frameworks, career paths, manager development

 - Employee experience — from onboarding to offboarding, every touchpoint designed intentionally


AGENT OPERATIONS

 - Identify where AI agents should replace manual People processes (and where they shouldn't)

 - Design and deploy agent-powered workflows: onboarding automation, sentiment analysis, people analytics, knowledge management

 - Build the playbook for how humans and agents collaborate inside the People function

 - Set the standard for AI-native people operations that the rest of the industry will follow




WHAT YOU'RE LIKE

You think in systems — from first principles. When you see a process, you don't ask "how do we improve this?" – you ask "should this exist at all?" You start from the outcome and work backwards, questioning inherited assumptions. You design workflows, feedback loops, and operating rhythms — not just policies.

You're analytical. You make decisions with data. You can build a dashboard, interrogate a trend, and translate numbers into action. Vibes are not a strategy.

You've worked in professional services. Agency, consulting, law firm, staffing — you understand the dynamics of servicing external clients, managing utilisation, and building culture when your people sit inside someone else's company.

You care about performance, not perks. High-performance culture to you means accountability, clarity, growth, and standards — not ping pong tables and snacks.

You're curious about AI. You don't need to write code. But you need to see AI agents as tools that make the People function better, faster, and more human — not threats
